instruction: Create a magazine-style cover from /home/user/Desktop/portrait_woman_774909.jpg at 1800x2400. Keep portrait as focus, keep the tone natural while slightly increasing contrast, and add layered text including masthead, main headline, three cover lines, and date/issue. Include visible words "STYLE", "ISSUE", and "2026" in the cover text. Required XCF layers: Masthead, Coverline_1, Coverline_2, Coverline_3, Date_Issue, Portrait_Base, Color_Grade. Export /home/user/Desktop/mag_cover_portrait.jpg (< 900KB) and save /home/user/Desktop/mag_cover_portrait.xcf.
